title: Polish RCA view-items button copy and flat styling

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation on feature/plx-next-data-flywheel: tighten category filter CTA copy and enforce flat, borderless styling in EvaluationTask RCA category cards.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verified current RCA/topic filter CTA implementation is concise and flat-style: both category and topic buttons render as 'View items (N)' using ghost variant with border-0/shadow-none and muted/secondary fills. Confirmed with targeted UI tests: EvaluationTask.category-filter + topic-list tests passing.
